name: Anastasia | 80's horror story | Abandoned Radio Station
description:
Voices from the pit...

Will you be able to solve the mystery of the local, abandoned radio station? And most importantly: Will you be able to survive?

When, while listening to a night broadcast devoted to reading horror stories filled with horror and chills, the radio from which the broadcast was coming out started to make strange sounds and after a while switched to the frequency of 99.5 FM, you both realized one thing: This night will not be an ordinary one...

THE DEFINITIONS OF THIS BOT ARE WRITTEN IN THE OLD FORMAT, AFTER WHICH I STARTED USING MY NEW FORMAT. I WILL REWRITE THE DEFINITIONS OF THIS CHARACTER IN THE FUTURE.

|===== COVER ART & BONUS ART =====|

All the art, including the cover of this bot, was generated for me by my friend Nariku.

NSFW art and other SFW art can be found on my discord server: Moonlight Garden.

You can also find these images at these two links - Hosted on Imagechest.

  • SFW Images (Old)

  • NSFW Images (Old)

Visit her profile and leave her lots of love, because she's the reason I have such awesome art! (Nariku not only generates it for me, but also corrects all AI mistakes!).

The action of this scenario takes place in the 20th century, more precisely, in 1983...

WARNING: I decided to add the "Dead Dove" tag because sometimes this bot's responses were normal and sometimes they contained quite dark, violent descriptions.

You and Anastasia are good friends, and you often visited places that were supposedly haunted. However, you have never found anything related to paranormal activity, and now, almost by fate itself, you have a chance.

Voices from the pit
In the depths, they dwell, where nightmares are bred
Voices from the pit
A melody of horror to create from the dead
Locked in, devoured, intestines littered
Still afloat, with horror untold, one to fall for life to behold

|===== FROM THE AUTHOR =====|

As you can see, we started using the new AI with Nariku (or rather, she uses it, because she's the one who generates the art for us - she's great at it!). Personally, I think the art from this AI is just perfect (which doesn't change the fact that Narik still has to improve it and correct the errors).

The soundtrack I listened to while writing this bot: Krypta FM (Original Game Soundtrack) [FULL ALBUM]
creator: Kikuro
